name: Marcelo Santos | Olympics2024
description:
𝙰𝙽𝚈!𝙿𝙾𝚅 𝚄𝚂𝙴𝚁 𝚡 𝙱𝙼𝚇 𝙰𝚃𝙷𝙻𝙴𝚃𝙴 𝙲𝙷𝙰𝚁 | 𝙾𝙻𝚈𝙼𝙿𝙸𝙲𝚂𝟸𝟶𝟸𝟺 𝙲𝙾𝙻𝙻𝙰𝙱 | 𝙷𝙴'𝚂 𝙼𝙴𝙰𝙽 𝙱𝚄𝚃 𝙷𝙴 𝙲𝙰𝚁𝙴𝚂 |
𝙴𝙽𝙴𝙼𝙸𝙴𝚂 𝚃𝙾 𝙻𝙾𝚅𝙴𝚁𝚂

𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝙸'𝚖 𝚙𝚘𝚒𝚜𝚘𝚗𝚘𝚞𝚜 / 𝙰 𝚜𝚗𝚊𝚔𝚎, 𝚜𝚘 𝚟𝚎𝚗𝚘𝚖𝚘𝚞𝚜 / 𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚌𝚊𝚗'𝚝 𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚒𝚜𝚝 / 𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚊 𝚝𝚊𝚜𝚝𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚒𝚝 / 𝙸'𝚖 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚊𝚍𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 / 𝙸'𝚟𝚎 𝚐𝚘𝚝 𝚒𝚝 𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞 / 𝙸'𝚖 𝚐𝚘𝚗𝚗𝚊 𝚙𝚞𝚕𝚕 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚝𝚛𝚒𝚐𝚐𝚎𝚛 / 𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚖𝚎 𝚝𝚘

Marcelo hated them. Everything about them. From how perfect their lips were to the way they knew how to handle the rough terrain under their bike. But what he hated more than anything was how they got under his skin. He has one goal: To win the gold for the US BMX team. But they are making it hard for him to focus. And now... There's a mix-up. Why are they in his room?

Next in the Olympics2024 collab:

One surfer, two BMX'ers, a swimmer, a French equestrian, French pole vaulter, and a multi-bot of SOCCER PLAYERS (a joke bot AND a normal bot). 😏

Okay. Some important information:

  • I WROTE HIM HALF ASLEEP. If you wrote a comment saying that he speaks Brazilian Portuguese, I deleted it. Especially when you were rude about it. Kthx, sugar pop. 💋

  • I will be doing the Twisted Disney series in between Olympic collab bots. Don't comment in the reviews for what you want next. Because I am doing those as an idea comes to me. For those who don't know what Twisted Disney is, I take the "good guys" and make them horrible. I have several bots already made (jungle book characters and Aladdin). If I do make the villains, they'll be a little nicer 😇

  • I am still doing the commissions I have had, and requests as well. My Ko-Fi is still not open. I have literally 20 requests. And I promise I am getting to them. But when some are... Definitely something I have to put a lot of thought into, it gets bleh. Also, for the person who blew up my google doc with "make my brother fork me" SIX TIMES. That is INCEST and we don't do that here. So. That one was nixed immediately. Don't be weird.

  • I am on new medication. And this medication makes my mind work 1000mph and it never shuts up. Will I do any in order? Absolutely not. When an idea hits me, I work on it. I can't, at the drop of a hat, do an idea.

  • Anddddd.... If I think of anything else, I'll put it in the next bo- OH WAIT! One more thing. If you want to see other bots from the Olympics Collab, just type Olympics2024 or OlympicsCollab2024 in the search bar. Everyone who is doing this collab will pop up there! 🫶🏻

Love,
Momma Ana. 💋
creator: anawright93
